title: Outlook account toevoegen
creator: remco.van.deurzen
content:
Ik heb een outlook account die ik wil toevoegen in de Thunderbird android app.

Na alle stappen te hebben doorlopen ontvang ik de melding user is authenticated not connected. Dit gebeurt bij de automatische configuratie.

Heb de handmatige configuratie geborneerd en gewijzigd naar starttls en poort 587 en authenticatie OAuth 2.0 en dit biedt ook geen oplossing.

Kan iemand mij helpen om een nieuw outlook account toe te voegen?

Alvast hartelijk dank.

title: verifica blocco invio email verso Hotmail/Outlook
creator: alessia3
content:
Buongiorno, sto inviando email dal gestionale Domustudio Cloud usando come server di posta in uscita smtps.aruba.it.

Alcuni destinatari con indirizzo Hotmail/Outlook non ricevono i messaggi perché il server destinatario restituisce questo errore:


550 5.7.1 Unfortunately, messages from [ 62.149.156.188 ] weren't sent. Please contact your Internet service provider since part of their network is on our block list (S3150). Vi chiedo di verificare se ci sono limitazioni o problemi di reputazione/blocco legati al server SMTP utilizzato per l'invio, e come procedere per risolvere il problema verso i destinatari Hotmail/Outlook.

Dettagli aggiuntivi:


invio effettuato tramite Domustudio Cloud

server SMTP configurato: smtps.aruba.it

errore restituito da Microsoft/Hotmail: 550 5.7.1 - S3150
metadata: ;useragent:Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/149.0.0.0 Safari/537.36;tb_version:140.11.1. esr;os:Windows 10

title: The certificate for mobile.charter.net does not come from a trusted source.
creator: thewyzard
content: I am using Thunderbird 151.0.1 (64-bit), and I get the "trusted source" message in a pop-up every time Thunderbird checks for email. There is only an option to Dismiss presented. My account name changes color to red and has a red triangle with an exclamation mark displayed. I went to Settings > Privacy & Security > Security > Certificates > Manage Certificates and looked at all the certificates listed in the Certificate Manager > Authorities (which is the only section with anything listed) and don't see anything from mobile.charter.net. I can go to SPECTRUM.NET (Charter) and view my email with no problems. I'm at a loss as to be able to view my email in Thunderbird.

title: Android Thunderbird app not synchronising all emails
creator: barry93
content: I have numerous Ionos email addresses. No problem seeing all received emails in Thunderbird app on my Windows PC. But Android app does not show some emails, despite synchronising numerous times. Problem is often with emails not showing in the unified inbox on the Android app. Also a problem with sent emails not showing. Today I looked for an email I had sent four days ago, and it was not in my Android sent folder. Synchronised, still not there. Synchronised again, still not there. Went online to Ionos and opened the sent email. Synchronised Android Thunderbird again and then it appeared. Why can't Anroid Thunderbird see certain emails? Problem seems to be especially bad with emails I have previously opened in Thunderbird on my Windows PC. Doing so seems to make the emails invisible to Android Thunderbird.
